org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view

Interface ViewComponentConstants

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractDirectionBasedFigureLayout, AbstractEllipsoidAnchorFigure, AbstractFigure, AbstractFigureLayout, AbstractModelObjectFigure, AbstractModelObjectSubFigure, AbstractRectangularAnchorFigure, AbstractSubFigure, AbstractViewComponent, AnchorFigure, BasicGridBagFigureLayout, BitmapFigure, BitmapNodeFigure, BlockDecorationFigure, CircleNodeFigure, CoercedBitmapFigure, CoercedTextFigure, DecorationFigure, EdgeFigure, EllipseFigure, EllipseNodeFigure, ForceBasedFigureLayout, FSMEndPointFigure, FSMStartPointFigure, FSMStateFigure, FSMTransitionFigure, GanswerSugiyamaFigureLayout, InvisibleCircleAnchorFigure, InvisibleEllipsoidAnchorFigure, InvisibleRectangularAnchorFigure, InvisibleRoundRectangularAnchorFigure, InvisibleSquareAnchorFigure, NodeFigure, PolylineEdgeFigure, PolylineFigure, RectangleFigure, RectangleNodeFigure, RoundRectangleNodeFigure, SegmentEdgeFigure, SquareNodeFigure, TextFigure

    public interface ViewComponentConstants
    Constants for all the view components.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static Color DEFAULT_ACTIVE_COLOR
      Default color for the active objects.
      static Color DEFAULT_BACKGROUND_SELECTION_COLOR
      Default color for the selected objects.
      static float DEFAULT_DAMAGING_EXTENTS
      Amount that should be added to bounds to obtain a damaged bound.
      static boolean DEFAULT_DRAW_SHADOW
      Default flag that indicates if the shadows should be drawn.
      static Color DEFAULT_FILL_COLOR
      Default color for the filled areas.
      static Color DEFAULT_FOREGROUND_SELECTION_COLOR
      Default color for the selected objects.
      static Color DEFAULT_LINE_COLOR
      Default color for the lines.
      static Color DEFAULT_LOCKING_FILL_COLOR
      Default color for the locking state.
      static Color DEFAULT_LOCKING_OUTLINE_COLOR
      Default color for the locking state.
      static float DEFAULT_MAXIMAL_SIZE
      Default maximal size of the figures in pixels.
      static float DEFAULT_MINIMAL_SIZE
      Default minimal size of the figures in pixels.
      static float DEFAULT_MINIMAL_SUBFIGURE_SIZE
      Default minimal size of the subfigures in pixels.
      static float DEFAULT_SHADOW_PROJECTION_DISTANCE_X
      Distance to project the shadows.
      static float DEFAULT_SHADOW_PROJECTION_DISTANCE_Y
      Distance to project the shadows.
      static float FLATTENING_PRECISION
      The precision, on the trigonometric circle, under which the segments are flattening.

    • Field Detail

      • FLATTENING_PRECISION

        static final float FLATTENING_PRECISION
        The precision, on the trigonometric circle, under which the segments are flattening.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • DEFAULT_DAMAGING_EXTENTS

        static final float DEFAULT_DAMAGING_EXTENTS
        Amount that should be added to bounds to obtain a damaged bound.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • DEFAULT_MINIMAL_SIZE

        static final float DEFAULT_MINIMAL_SIZE
        Default minimal size of the figures in pixels.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • DEFAULT_MAXIMAL_SIZE

        static final float DEFAULT_MAXIMAL_SIZE
        Default maximal size of the figures in pixels.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • DEFAULT_MINIMAL_SUBFIGURE_SIZE

        static final float DEFAULT_MINIMAL_SUBFIGURE_SIZE
        Default minimal size of the subfigures in pixels.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • DEFAULT_DRAW_SHADOW

        static final boolean DEFAULT_DRAW_SHADOW
        Default flag that indicates if the shadows should be drawn. This flag may be otherriden by the preference "DRAW_SHADOW".
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • DEFAULT_LOCKING_OUTLINE_COLOR

        static final Color DEFAULT_LOCKING_OUTLINE_COLOR
        Default color for the locking state. This flag may be otherriden by the preference "LOCKING_OUTLINE_COLOR". This preference is an integer value that is representing the components of the RGBA color.

      • DEFAULT_LOCKING_FILL_COLOR

        static final Color DEFAULT_LOCKING_FILL_COLOR
        Default color for the locking state. This flag may be otherriden by the preference "LOCKING_FILL_COLOR". This preference is an integer value that is representing the components of the RGBA color.

      • DEFAULT_BACKGROUND_SELECTION_COLOR

        static final Color DEFAULT_BACKGROUND_SELECTION_COLOR
        Default color for the selected objects. This color may be provided by the ViewComponentContainer when it is known. This flag may be otherriden by the preference "BACKGROUND_SELECTION_COLOR". This preference is an integer value that is representing the components of the RGBA color.

      • DEFAULT_FOREGROUND_SELECTION_COLOR

        static final Color DEFAULT_FOREGROUND_SELECTION_COLOR
        Default color for the selected objects. This color may be provided by the ViewComponentContainer when it is known. This flag may be otherriden by the preference "FOREGROUND_SELECTION_COLOR". This preference is an integer value that is representing the components of the RGBA color.

      • DEFAULT_FILL_COLOR

        static final Color DEFAULT_FILL_COLOR
        Default color for the filled areas. This flag may be otherriden by the preference "FILL_COLOR". This preference is an integer value that is representing the components of the RGBA color.

      • DEFAULT_LINE_COLOR

        static final Color DEFAULT_LINE_COLOR
        Default color for the lines. This flag may be otherriden by the preference "LINE_COLOR". This preference is an integer value that is representing the components of the RGBA color.

      • DEFAULT_ACTIVE_COLOR

        static final Color DEFAULT_ACTIVE_COLOR
        Default color for the active objects. This flag may be otherriden by the preference "ACTIVE_COLOR". This preference is an integer value that is representing the components of the RGBA color.

      • DEFAULT_SHADOW_PROJECTION_DISTANCE_X

        static final float DEFAULT_SHADOW_PROJECTION_DISTANCE_X
        Distance to project the shadows.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • DEFAULT_SHADOW_PROJECTION_DISTANCE_Y

        static final float DEFAULT_SHADOW_PROJECTION_DISTANCE_Y
        Distance to project the shadows.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values
